title: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 22 October 2021
section_path: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 22 October 2021
section_path_text: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 22 October 2021
summary:
Main
The subcontinent recycling market is witnessing a surge of enquiries from interested end buyers as the steel prices are skyrocketing across the globe
Source: Best Oasis Limited

Linked asset: 2021-10-23_best-oasis-weekly-recycling-market-report-22-october-2021_weekly-ship-recycling-report-3_413ac93b35b3.pdf
Source asset: reports/hellenic/demolition/pdfs/2021-10-23_best-oasis-weekly-recycling-market-report-22-october-2021_weekly-ship-recycling-report-3_413ac93b35b3.pdf

[Page 1]
WEEKLY
hekllenic
SHIP
RECYCLING
REPORT
15th October 2021 to 22nd October 2021
Highlights of the Week
The subcontinent recycling market is witnessing a surge of enquiries from
jhhnhu
interested end buyers as the steel prices are skyrocketing across the globe
and are further expected to go up due to the ongoing coal and power
shortages. While the 1st half of 2021 saw the demolition prices rising led by
the iron ore rally, the current momentum is supported by price rally of coal
and other input raw materials. The prevailing scarcity of available candidates in the demolition market is
expected to keep the prices soaring in the near future.
